name: RPlog_talk_The_Cat_and_the_Mouse
title: Talk: The Cat and the Mouse -- Is Kamino a Secret?
summary: This is an out-of-character wiki talk page where players and staff debate the canonical status of the planet Kamino in relation to a roleplay log. Danik Kreldin opens by questioning whether Kamino's location is still meant to be a hidden, Empire-controlled cloning world, and asks whether a dispute notice is warranted. ImperialFH, Xerxes, Hawke, Lolkje, and Mahon weigh in, generally agreeing that after the Clone Wars the planet would be widely known of even if remote and tightly secured. The discussion concludes with ImperialFH noting that Kamino was chosen as a neutral meeting spot by mistake, that the players involved (Raxis and Jal'Dana) consented to relocating the scene, and that the galaxy map's Imperial control zone around Kamino would be adjusted accordingly.
